---
title: "Research Papers"
format: html
toc: false
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<!-- # CIOP - Cognitive Interaction Optimization Platform - <b>[**Completed**]{style="color:green;"} -->

<!-- CIOP consists of two sub projects -->

# **Autonomous Command Optimization Network (ACON)**

Research Paper - [v1.0 via Multi-Arm Bandit](./acon.qmd)

<br>

#  **DIRAC**: Deterministic Forensic Model for Measuring Information Entropy in LLM Generated Software

Research Paper - [v1.0 DIRAC](./dirac_technical_paper.qmd) 

<br>

# **DIRAC**: A Forensic Framework for Quantifying Engineering and Financial Leakage in the Era of LLMs

White Paper - [v1.0 DIRAC](./dirac_white_paper.qmd)


<br>
<br>

# Try DIRAC: [v1.0 DIRAC](./dirac_interface.qmd)
